title: AWS Online Test
text:
# AWS Online Test

Test real-world AWS skills that matter in a world with AI. Protected by AI proctoring.

## For jobseekers

Practice your skills and earn a certificate of achievement when you score in the top 25%.

Take a Practice Test

## For companies

Screen real AWS skills, flag human or AI assistance, and interview the right people.

Create an AWS Screening Test

From $7 per candidate

## About the test

The Amazon Web Services (AWS) online test assesses knowledge of deploying applications and managing cloud resources on AWS.

The assessment includes work-sample tasks such as:

* Using AWS services such as S3, EC2, and Route 53.
* Managing access to resources using IAM.
* Ensuring high availability and continuous operation.

A good AWS developer or administrator needs a solid understanding of the AWS platform in order to successfully deploy and manage applications and cloud infrastructure.

## Sample public questions

Internal Website

Hard

3 min

mca

Public

AWS

EC2

Route 53

S3

Your boss has requested that you create a simple and inexpensive AWS solution that would make an internal website publicly available.

Furthermore, because of security restraints, AWS resources are accessible from within the company, but AWS services cannot access the company network.

Which statements would allow you to implement a solution based on these constraints?

Solve Question

High Scores

Hard

5 min

mca

Public

AWS

API Gateway

Cloud Computing

EC2

Routing

You're working on a REST service to handle high scores in the video game 'Jumping to the Skies'.

API Gateway is being considered as an intermediate between the server and the players.

Taking into account that:

* The scores will be stored with DynamoDB.
* Users will interact with the service through POST and GET calls to /scores. The calls require an authentication token.
* The application needs to be protected from attacks, like excessive requests from a single client.
* You have the public certificate for jumpingtotheskies.com generated and stored with AWS Certificate Manager.

Which of the following would be available, useful capabilities of API Gateway in this scenario?

Solve Question

Git to Host

Easy

3 min

mca

Public

AWS

EC2

You want to use an EC2 instance to host a website. The code for your website uses Git for version control.

Select all of the actions you need to perform to be able to host the website on EC2.

Solve Question

Web Service

Easy

3 min

mca

Public

AWS

Elastic Beanstalk

HTTPS

You are maintaining a Java web service that has been deployed into AWS Elastic Beanstalk, and want to enable HTTPS support.

Select the correct statements.

Solve Question
